omitted_declarations.policy_reference: If you choose to publish content (such as a review or comment) on the Grab Platform, it will be shown publicly along with your personal data (such as username, uploaded photo(s)), and other information you have included in your content. For more information, see our Review Guidelines. (https://www.grab.com/sg/terms-policies/ugc-terms-reviews)
